body:
## Summary

Brings Hyperliquid spot trading (HIP-4) to the platform under the unified-account
account-abstraction migration. The shared `OrderEntry`, `AccountOverview`,
`ActivityPanel`, and Header surfaces now branch internally on `productKind`,
sourcing balances/holds from `spotClearinghouseState` per the unified read-model
contract. The same change touches the backend read model, the cross-package
contracts, the runtime hook layer, and the perps-app UI shell.

**Scale**: 334 commits, 1,025 files changed (+204k / -8k). The bulk of the
addition is structured planning artefacts in `bare_metal/` (~550 files of plan
JSON, fixtures, decision records); the production-code surface is ~470 files
across `apps/perps-app`, `workers/main`, `packages/{perps,web-shared,types,
main-service-contract}`, plus a single migration.

Reference plans (in-tree):

- `bare_metal/spot-hip4-integration/` — Spot V1 scope, capability matrix, fixtures (HSC-\*)
- `bare_metal/hyperliquid-unified-account-migration/` — read-model contracts, decision records (HUA-\*)
- `bare_metal/perps-refactor/` — IPRA-\* tasks: header/product-nav, OrderEntry convergence, ActivityPanel shell
- `bare_metal/infinex-perps-ui-refactor/` — pre-port UI smoke fixtures and runsheets
- `bare_metal/design-prototype/` — design-prototype-app harness used for visual fixture lock

## What this PR delivers

### 1. Spot V1 product surface (HSC-\*)

- USDC-quoted spot market catalog with Hyperliquid spot asset identity
  (`packages/perps/src/exchanges/hyperliquid/assetIdentity.ts`,
  `normalization.ts`, HIP-3 utilities).
- Spot order entry: market / limit / post-only, cancel/modify, with the
  shared `OrderEntry` ticket branching on `productKind` instead of forking the
  component (IPRA-003).
- Spot balances, open orders, trade history, market-cap and supply tiles,
  realtime PnL/ROE preserving spot cost basis through the read model.
- Pre-trade banners, deposit detection, watchlist + selector filtering, and
  market-changer button now all participate in `productKind`.
- Sticky per-product last-symbol nav; canonical-href pre-resolution to
  eliminate the two-click Spot/Perps jump.

### 2. Unified-account migration (HUA-\*)

- **HUA-001/002**: unified-account readiness contracts; activation flow
  replaced with the unified-account setup ceremony.
- **HUA-003/004**: runtime + order-entry readiness gates keyed off
  `userAbstraction === "unifiedAccount"`. Non-unified modes (`disabled`,
  `dexAbstraction`, `portfolioMargin`, `default`, unknown) are explicitly
  unsupported and surface reason codes from `product-policy.md`.
- **HUA-005/006**: `HyperliquidClient` and `HyperliquidAdapter` (subscription
  state) switched to `spotClearinghouseState` as the unified balance/hold truth.
  Per-dex queries are retained only for positions, orders, market identity, and
  routing — never for balance summing across clearinghouses.
- **HUA-007/008**: HIP-3 core market identity and app payloads preserved
  through the new identity model.
- **HUA-009/010**: legacy `usdClassTransfer` runtime capability and backend
  command API removed. Provider symbols remain in lower-level adapters and test
  fixtures for plumbing only, but no product surface exposes class transfer
  under the unified-only policy.
- **HUA-011/012/013/014/015**: spot funding panel removed, unified-account
  summary shell, spot activity tables/cards, product header navigation contract,
  and spot-shell smoke guard.

### 3. Backend read-model refactor (`workers/main`, `packages/web-shared`)

- Provider-aware perps read model with shadow comparison test
  (`readModelShadowComparison.test.ts`).
- `getAccount`, `getBalances`, `getActivity`, `getHistory`, `getUserFills`,
  `getSymbolPerformance`, `getDailyProfitMatrix`, `getExternalActions`,
  `deposit`, `withdraw`, `depositWithSwidge` migrated/extended for spot.
- Spot cost basis preserved through the read model so PNL/ROE remain correct
  on spot positions.
- External-action review workflow (`externalActionReview.ts` +
  `externalActionIndeterminate.ts`) plus the `0257_external_action_review.sql`
  migration.
- Inngest handlers updated: Hyperliquid deposit/withdraw, post-swidge deposit,
  Lighter withdrawal, Synthetix withdrawal.
- `packages/web-shared` runtime hooks (`usePerpsBalances`, `usePerpsAccount`,
  `usePerpsActivities`, `usePerpsDataset`, `usePerpsWithdrawal`,
  `usePerpsPageViewModel`) migrated to the canonical read model; legacy
  Hyperliquid balance surface removed.

### 4. Cross-package contract changes

- `packages/main-service-contract` perps router (`router.ts`, `index.ts`,
  `limits.ts`, and every per-op contract) updated for spot + unified shape.
- `packages/types/perps/domain` (`account.ts`, `contracts.ts`, `market.ts`,
  `order.ts`, `providerRegistry.ts`) updated; provider registry now models
  capability requirements via intent adapters (`orderIntentAdapter`,
  `riskIntentAdapter`, `capabilityRequirements`, `intentValidator`).
- Feature-flag and external-app-action types updated for spot gating.

### 5. UI shell refactor (IPRA-\* — `apps/perps-app` smoke port)

- IPRA-001/002: product UI profile, terminology, and product nav promoted
  into the Header.
- IPRA-003: `OrderEntry` converged into a single product-aware ticket
  (replaces the previous spot/perps fork).
- IPRA-004: spot funding branches replaced with unified-account summary.
- IPRA-005: `ActivityPanel` converged into a product-aware shell.
- IPRA-006: `HomePage` branches and dead spot panel wrappers removed.
- IPRA-007/008: frontend contract + visual fixtures refreshed; docs and risk
  register updated.
- Smoke parity port from `bare_metal/infinex-perps-ui-refactor/` (token
  selector, user menu, MarketInfoBar, AuthSection, ActivityPanel bodies).

## Post-merge fixes (head of branch)

`24f9a74a2c` reconciled 327 upstream commits. Three regressions surfaced and
are fixed at the head of the branch:

- `66b3f38c83` **fix(web-app)**: restore `https://perps.app.local` in the
  WebAuthn ROR allow-list at `apps/web-app/vite.config.ts`. The merge dropped
  the line Kain added in `59044ffd42`, causing `The RP ID "localhost" is
invalid for this domain` and blocking trading activation. Empirically
  verified: passkey activation now succeeds end-to-end.
- `ef5596052b` **fix(perps-app)**: `projectSpotBalances` now computes spot
  `available` as `max(total - hold, 0)` in both `HyperliquidClient.ts` and
  `HyperliquidAdapter.ts`. Previously it used
  `tokenToAvailableAfterMaintenance`, a maintenance-margin figure that counts
  USDC locked in open orders as recoverable. Confirmed against Hyperliquid's
  own spot UI (a wallet with held USDC shows `total - hold`, not the
  maintenance number) — the previous projection let users build orders the
  spot engine then rejected with `Insufficient spot balance`.
- `ac2e1ddc92` **chore(perps-app)**: drop a `[SPOT-DEBUG]` `console.log` from
  `OrderEntry.tsx` left over from the diagnostic that found the projection
  bug.

`a06828d4f8` is the second merge of `origin/main` resolving the
`workers/main/.generated-types/worker-configuration.d.ts` hash-comment
conflict by regenerating the wrangler types.

## Architecture notes worth flagging for review

- **Unified balance truth**: `spotClearinghouseState` only. Do NOT sum
  `withdrawable`/`accountValue` across main and HIP-3 clearinghouses (see
  `bare_metal/hyperliquid-unified-account-migration/read-model-contracts.md`).
  Live fixtures show non-zero spot USDC while main
  `clearinghouseState.withdrawable` is zero.
- **`userAbstraction === "unifiedAccount"` is a risk-abstraction mode**, not a
  physical pool merge. Per-dex queries still exist; this PR centralises only
  the _balance/hold projection_, not the raw provider surface.
- **Account modes**: `disabled`, `dexAbstraction`, `portfolioMargin`,
  `default`, and any unknown mode are unsupported. Spot trading is blocked
  until migration to `unifiedAccount`.
- **HIP-4 status**: prediction/HIP-4 capabilities remain `fixture_gated` /
  `unsupported` / `not_applicable`. No HIP-4 production execution surface
  ships in this PR — only the identity and capability plumbing.
- **No class transfer**: `usdClassTransfer` is not exposed as product funding
  under the unified-only policy. Provider symbols remain in lower-level
  adapters/test fixtures for plumbing only.
- **`bare_metal/` plan artefacts**: most of the +204k LOC. They are
  load-bearing context for reviewers but are not shipped runtime; they live
  inside the repo as decision records and fixtures.

## Test plan

- [ ] Activation: WebAuthn passkey ceremony succeeds on `https://perps.app.local`
- [ ] Spot order entry: "Available balance" matches `spotClearinghouseState`
      `total - hold` for USDC (cross-check against Spot Balances list + unified
      account panel)
- [ ] Spot buy: place a market order; verify it does not exceed displayed
      available; verify fill on the matching engine
- [ ] Spot sell: base-token balance flows through the same projection
- [ ] Spot balances/open orders/trade history render correctly; spot cost
      basis preserved in PnL/ROE
- [ ] Perps remains unchanged (positions, leverage, margin, liquidation,
      withdrawable)
- [ ] Header/product nav: Spot/Perps switch is one click; last symbol per
      product is remembered
- [ ] Watchlist + market selector filter by current product
- [ ] Deposit/Withdraw flows succeed under the new readiness gate; swidge
      refund path tolerated
- [ ] External-action review surfaces correctly for indeterminate states
- [ ] Unsupported-mode users see readiness gate and copy from
      `product-policy.md`
- [ ] CI: `just check` (format, lint, types, migrations) green
- [ ] Unit tests: `pnpm turbo run test:unit --filter=@infinex-private/perps-app`
- [ ] Integration: `just test-integration` covers perps read-model shadow
      comparison and external-action review

## Migration / rollback

- **Migration**: `0257_external_action_review.sql` (consolidated with main's
  `0256_cheerful_butterfly`). Orphan
  `0258_usd_class_transfer_internal_movement.sql` removed in `0bdf9fb34c`.
- **Schema/snapshot**: `meta/0257_snapshot.json` + `meta/_journal.json`
  updated accordingly.
- **Rollback path**: revert merge `24f9a74a2c` if a structural problem
  surfaces. The three post-merge fixes and the second merge (`a06828d4f8`)
  are independently revertable. The migration is forward-only but has no
  destructive column changes.
title: feat: Hyperliquid spot trading (HIP-4 + unified-account migration)
